data.content: Retake fix completed on feature/terminal-light-theme. Wired AgentHistoryConversationLog onto the shared terminalLightTheme preference via a new conversation-log theme helper so the history titlebar, conversation tabs, session pills, and console/loading states now switch with the same persisted setting as Terminal and History Debug. Added contract coverage for the light palette strings. Validation: bun run lint (passes with existing beat-form React Compiler warning only), bunx tsc --noEmit, bun run test, bun run build. Browser validation with chrome-devtools on 2026-03-31: toggled light theme from live Terminal header, Settings > Defaults, and History Debug header; verified the paired controls mirrored state, light-mode tab/title/body text rendered with dark foregrounds on light backgrounds, and the checked light-theme state persisted after reload on /beats?view=history and restored the live Terminal immediately.
